title: Volkswagen Turns Jetta Into Affordable Electric SUV for China
detail: Volkswagen has revealed an affordable electric SUV based on the Jetta nameplate targeting the Chinese market — the world's largest EV arena. The Jetta-branded EV SUV expands Volkswagen's affordable EV lineup in China, where competition from domestic brands like BYD and NIO is intense. The move signals VW's commitment to competing at lower price points in the critical Chinese market.

media.caption: Volkswagen Jetta-branded electric SUV revealed for the Chinese market

title: Hyundai and Kia Extend Warranties for ICCU Failures
detail: Hyundai and Kia have announced extended warranties for vehicles affected by Integrated Charging Control Unit (ICCU) failures — a known reliability issue that has left some EV owners stranded with inoperable 12V systems. The warranty extension addresses concerns about EV reliability and signals the automakers' commitment to supporting affected customers, while highlighting ongoing challenges in EV component durability.

media.caption: Hyundai and Kia announce extended warranties for vehicles with ICCU failures
